articles.title: SPPU V-C sends staff on compulsory leave, announces forensic audit
articles.description: SPPU vice-chancellor announced that head of department of technology will be sent on compulsory leave from March 27 and forensic audit of functioning of the university will be conducted in a month
articles.content: As the Friday session of the senate began, members prevented the VC from presenting the budget, insisting on ‘concrete answers and action’ against long-standing allegations of corruption and inaction. Members pointed out that the issue had been raise... [2349 chars]

articles.title: Clean Energy transition part of India’s larger national, geopolitical strategy: Dr Jitendra
articles.description: Excelsior Correspondent 28NEW DELHI, Mar 27: Union Minister of State (Independent Charge) for Science & Technology, Earth Sciences, and MoS PMO, Personnel, Public Grievances, Pensions, Atomic Energy and Space, Dr. Jitendra Singh today said that India’s clean energy transition is part of a larger national strategy aimed at reducing import dependence, strengthening indigenous capacities, and enabling the country to play a leading role in the global shift towards a greener future. Addressing the Planet C3 Summit on Climate, Circularity and […]
articles.content:

28NEW DELHI, Mar 27: Union Minister of State (Independent Charge) for Science & Technology, Earth Sciences, and MoS PMO, Personnel, Public Grievances, Pensions, Atomic Energy and Space, Dr. Jitendra Singh today said that India... [2625 chars]

articles.title: Govt brings SEM testing to strengthen Pashmina certification
articles.description: Irfan Tramboo Srinagar, Mar 27: In a move to strengthen quality assurance and global credibility of Kashmir’s famed Pashmina, the Directorate of Handicrafts and Handloom, Kashmir, has procured a high-end Scanning Electron Microscope (SEM) for the Pashmina Testing and Quality Certification Centre (PTQCC). The introduction of SEM-based testing is aimed at achieving international standards in Geographical Indication (GI) testing and certification of Pashmina and other handwoven products, officials said. According to officials the advanced technology will enable precise fibre analysis […]
articles.content:
Irfan Tramboo
Srinagar, Mar 27: In a move to strengthen quality assurance and global credibility of Kashmir’s famed Pashmina, the Directorate of Handicrafts and Handloom, Kashmir, has procured a high-end Scanning Electron Microscope (SEM) for the Pas... [2685 chars]

articles.title: Canadian quantum stock Xanadu jumps in first day of trading on Nasdaq
articles.description: First Canadian technology company to list publicly in more than five years
articles.content:
Article content
Shares of Toronto startup Xanadu Quantum Technologies Ltd. jumped in their first day of trading on Friday, closing at US$11.50 per share in New York.

articles.title: Cambridge Technology Enterprises: Promoter Cloud Computing LLC Increases Stake to 55.75%
articles.description: Cambridge Technology Enterprises Limited reported a significant change in promoter holdings as Cloud Computing LLC acquired 9.50 lakh additional equity shares worth ₹2.22 crore through off-market transaction on March 25, 2026. The acquisition increased the promoter's stake from 50.91% to 55.75%, demonstrating continued confidence in the company's prospects. The transaction was disclosed under SEBI PIT Regulations with proper regulatory compliance maintained through Form C submission to stock exchanges.
articles.content: Cambridge Technology Enterprises Limited has announced a significant increase in promoter shareholding, with Cloud Computing LLC acquiring additional equity shares worth ₹2.22 crore. The transaction demonstrates continued confidence from the company'... [5642 chars]

articles.title: Nepal cabinet decides to implement Gen Z movement probe commission's report in 1st meeting
articles.description: KATHMANDU, Mar 27: The first Cabinet meeting of the newly formed government, chaired by Prime Minister Balendra Shah, on Friday decided to immediately implement the report of the high-level commission’s investigation into the Gen Z movement in September last year. The cabinet meeting also decided to appoint Minister for Science and Technology Sasmit Pokharel as its spokesperson. Following the cabinet meeting, Spokesperson Pokharel informed media persons that the cabinet had decided to immediately implement the report of the probe commission […]
articles.content: KATHMANDU, Mar 27: The first Cabinet meeting of the newly formed government, chaired by Prime Minister Balendra Shah, on Friday decided to immediately implement the report of the high-level commission’s investigation into the Gen Z movement in Septem... [1201 chars]

articles.title: Why China Is Investigating US Green Tariffs Ahead of Trump Visit
articles.description: Beijing launched a sweeping investigation into US efforts to block imports of Chinese clean technology on Friday. China’s Ministry of Commerce announced the probe into “trade barriers on green products” alongside a separate trade investigation in the lead-up to an expected visit to Beijing by President Donald Trump in May.
articles.content: Beijing launched a sweeping investigation into US efforts to block imports of Chinese clean technology on Friday. China’s Ministry of Commerce announced the probe into “trade barriers on green products” alongside a separate trade investigation in the... [370 chars]
